ingredients.name: Maruman Eel Restaurant
ingredients.entityContext: Maruman Eel Restaurant (丸万うなぎ食堂) on Yanagasedori is one of the Yanagase district eateries recreated as a background location in the anime's downtown scenes.

ingredients.name: Menyarokusanroku Gifuten
ingredients.localName: 麺や六三六 岐阜店

ingredients.name: Gifu Park
ingredients.entityContext: Gifu Park's central fountain and goddess statue appear in the anime's ending credits sequence, and the park's information center serves as the backdrop for dialogue scenes in Episode 7. The park grounds beneath Gifu Castle give the city its distinctive skyline visible across the series.

ingredients.name: Namikoshi
ingredients.address: 帝国ホテル 東京 M2F, 1 Chome-1-1 Uchisaiwaicho, Chiyoda City, Tokyo 100-0011, Japan

ingredients.name: Yoshimaru
ingredients.address: 岐阜一ビル 1F, 5 Chome-7 Kandamachi, Gifu, 500-8833, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: Yoshimaru, a long-standing takoyaki stall in the Yanagase shopping area, appears as background scenery in the Yanagase street sequences that establish the flavour of Kirashi City's downtown.

ingredients.name: Kotohira Shrine
ingredients.address: 5 Chome-46-15 Ozenjihigashi, Asao-ku, Kawasaki, Kanagawa 215-0018, Japan

ingredients.name: Mos Burger Yanagasechuoten
ingredients.localName: モスバーガー柳ヶ瀬中央店
ingredients.entityContext: The Mos Burger in the Yanagase shopping district appears as a background location in the anime's Yanagase street scenes, its distinctive red signage visible in the covered arcade.

ingredients.name: Goto Residence
ingredients.address: 3 Chome-1-3 Shioyacho, Tarumi-ku, Kobe, Hyogo 655-0872, Japan

ingredients.name: Shogetsudo Yanagase Main Store
ingredients.localName: 松月堂 柳ヶ瀬本店

ingredients.name: Gifu Castle Rakuichi Rakuza
ingredients.entityContext: The Rakuichi Rakuza shop at the base of Gifu Castle appears in the anime as the tourist-area restaurant near the ropeway, seen during the characters' visit to the Kinkazan area. SHOSHIMIN promotional panels are displayed at the adjacent ropeway station.

ingredients.name: Nanaya
ingredients.address: 2 Chome-5-12 Gofukucho, Aoi Ward, Shizuoka, 420-0031, Japan

ingredients.name: Inaba Shrine Approach
ingredients.entityContext: The stone-paved approach to Inaba Shrine (伊奈波神社) models the path to the shrine festival in Episode 6, where Osanai and Kobato attend the summer matsuri. The torii-lined walkway is one of the most photographed shoshimin pilgrimage spots.

ingredients.name: Statue of Young Oda Nobunaga
ingredients.entityContext: The bronze statue of young Oda Nobunaga in Gifu Park is a recognizable landmark in the park scenes throughout the series, grounding the fictional Kirashi City's park visually in real Gifu.

ingredients.name: 7-Eleven Gifu Meitokucho
ingredients.localName: セブン-イレブン 岐阜明徳町店
ingredients.type: コンビニエンスストア
categories: コンビニエンスストア
ingredients.entityContext: This convenience store on Meitokucho appears as a background location in the anime's city-center scenes, typical of the series' faithful recreation of Gifu's urban fabric.

ingredients.name: ITTO Individual Instruction Academy Nagara School
ingredients.localName: ITTO個別指導学院 長良校

ingredients.name: MLIT Kiso River Upstream Office
ingredients.localName: 国土交通省 木曽川上流河川事務所
ingredients.address: 国土交通省中部地方整備局木曽川上流河川事務所, 5 Chome-1-1 Chusetsucho, Gifu, 500-8801, Japan
ingredients.entityContext: The Ministry of Land Infrastructure building along the Nagara River features in background shots of the riverside route the characters walk between home and school.

ingredients.name: Gifu City South Sports Center
ingredients.localName: 岐阜市南部スポーツセンター

ingredients.name: Chusetsu-minami
ingredients.entityContext: The Chusetsu-minami bus stop on the south side of Chusetsu Bridge is the transit point characters use when commuting across the Nagara River, appearing in background scenes throughout the series.

ingredients.name: Warattoko NEO Yanagase
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒500-8875 Gifu, Yanagasedori, 2 Chome−14 マルシンビル 1F

ingredients.name: Anrakuji
ingredients.address: 21 Shishigatani Goshonodancho, Sakyo Ward, Kyoto, 606-8422, Japan

ingredients.name: Daihatsu Nagara
ingredients.localName: 岐阜ダイハツ販売 長良店

ingredients.name: Zaimokucho Rikuzaka
ingredients.entityContext: The Zaimokucho flood gate (材木町陸閘) on the Nagara River embankment appears in commuting scenes in Episode 2, as the characters pass it on their way home from the city center.

ingredients.name: Nobunaga's Garden
ingredients.entityContext: Nobunaga's Garden, the landscaped area at the foot of Gifu Castle hill within Gifu Park, appears as background scenery in the park scenes of the anime's Kirashi City.

ingredients.name: Kashimori Park
ingredients.entityContext: Kashimori Park (粕森公園) is identified in pilgrimage guides as the location of a distinctive spiral staircase and ring-shaped gate that appears in Episode 4 of the series.

ingredients.name: Bincho Irori-an
ingredients.entityContext: Bincho Irori-an (備長いろり庵) is one of the Yanagasedori izakaya facades visible in the anime's evening street scenes along the Yanagase shopping district.

ingredients.name: PC Cielge Gifu store
ingredients.localName: パソコンシェルジュ岐阜店

ingredients.name: Gifu Naka Police Station Station Police Box
ingredients.localName: 岐阜中警察署 駅前交番

ingredients.name: Kitagawa Shoten Co., Ltd.
ingredients.address: Japan, 〒559-0005 Osaka, Suminoe Ward, Nishisuminoe, 2 Chome−12−18

ingredients.name: Natural Cafe
ingredients.entityContext: Natural Cafe is the real-world model for the café 'Selisia' in Episodes 9–10, where Kobato and Osanai share the summer-limited tropical parfait, Osanai's top-ranked seasonal sweet. Fans visit to order the same parfait and sit in the characters' booth.

ingredients.name: Kawaramachi Club La Luna Piena
ingredients.localName: 川原町倶楽部 ラ・ルーナ ピエーナ

ingredients.name: Gifu Tanmen Nagara
ingredients.localName: 岐阜タンメン 長良店

ingredients.name: Da Babbo
ingredients.localName: ピッツェリア ダ・バッボ

ingredients.name: AND LADY
ingredients.entityContext: AND LADY is the real-world model for the confectionery shop 'Alice' where the protagonist purchases a strawberry tart in Episode 1, the sweet that opens the series' running theme of Osanai's refined taste.

ingredients.name: Nagara Bridge
ingredients.entityContext: Nagara Bridge is the secondary river crossing in the series, visible in establishing shots of the Nagara riverside that bookend several episodes.

ingredients.name: Kobo-mae
ingredients.entityContext: The Kobo-mae bus stop is one of the transit points on the characters' regular route through Gifu City, seen in commuting scenes throughout the series.

ingredients.name: Yanagase Hinodecho Shopping Street
ingredients.localName: 柳ヶ瀬日ノ出町商店街
ingredients.entityContext: The Yanagase covered shopping arcade (柳ヶ瀬) is the central downtown setting of Kirashi City, faithfully recreated with its retro signboards and arcade roof. Characters walk this street across multiple episodes, and the stamp-rally collaboration badge can be collected here.

ingredients.name: Princess Branche Pâtisserie KURA
ingredients.entityContext: This patisserie is the model for the cake shop 'Humpty Dumpty' that appears repeatedly throughout the series as Osanai's favorite source of refined sweets. The shop's real cakes and tarts mirror the confections the characters discuss in careful, analytical detail.

ingredients.name: Hinomaru Taxi Stand (Nagara Bridge)
ingredients.localName: 日の丸タクシーのりば（長良橋）
ingredients.entityContext: The taxi stand near Nagara Bridge is a minor transit landmark in the series, visible in scenes establishing the Nagara riverfront area of Kirashi City.

ingredients.name: Chusetsu-bashi(Bus)
ingredients.entityContext: The Chusetsu Bridge bus stop anchors the characters' commuting route across the Nagara River; it is seen in recurring transit scenes establishing the geography of Kirashi City.

ingredients.name: Ogakikyoritsuginko Noritake Shiten
ingredients.localName: （株）大垣共立銀行 則武支店

ingredients.name: Chusetsu Bridge
ingredients.entityContext: Chusetsu Bridge (忠節橋) over the Nagara River is the series' most iconic commuting landmark, a long crossing seen repeatedly as the characters travel between home and school. Its wide river panorama and distinctive silhouette appear throughout the opening and ending credits.

ingredients.name: Near the Labo Party Nagara Classroom
ingredients.localName: 子ども英語Labo Party 長良教室

ingredients.name: Kinkazan Observatory
ingredients.entityContext: The Kinkazan Observatory atop Mt. Kinka (reached by ropeway from Gifu Park) provides the aerial view of Chusetsu Bridge and the Nagara River that closes Episode 10. The observatory platform is decorated with SHOSHIMIN panels and is the highest official pilgrimage point in the series.

ingredients.name: Inaba Shrine
ingredients.entityContext: Inaba Shrine serves as the model for Kirashi's summer festival shrine in Episode 6, with its wooded grounds and stone steps recreated faithfully in the anime. Within the shrine complex is the Kaede Inari sub-shrine featured in a pivotal scene between Osanai and Kaminouchi.

ingredients.name: Ishigure Coffee
ingredients.entityContext: Ishigure Coffee is identified in pilgrimage guides as a café location appearing in the anime's Gifu City scenes.
